settings.html:
<div id="converter-v3-snapshot-capture-node-2" class="converter-v3-snapshot-section" data-converter-v3-snapshot-section="capture-node-2">
  <style>
    #converter-v3-snapshot-capture-node-2{position:relative;width:100%;}
    #converter-v3-snapshot-capture-node-2 .converter-v3-snapshot-stage{position:relative;display:block;width:100%;max-width:1424px;margin:0 auto;aspect-ratio:1424 / 1200;background-image:url("data:image/png;base64,");background-size:100% 100%;background-position:center top;background-repeat:no-repeat}
    #converter-v3-snapshot-capture-node-2 .converter-v3-snapshot-link{
      position:absolute;
      display:block;
      background:transparent !important;
      border:none !important;
      box-shadow:none !important;
      outline:none !important;
      color:transparent !important;
      font-size:0 !important;
      line-height:0 !important;
      text-decoration:none !important;
      padding:0 !important;
      margin:0 !important;
      opacity:0 !important;
      appearance:none !important;
      pointer-events:auto !important;
      overflow:hidden;
    }
    @media (max-width:1024px){#converter-v3-snapshot-capture-node-2 .converter-v3-snapshot-stage{max-width:818px;aspect-ratio:818 / 1194;background-image:url("data:image/png;base64,")}}
    @media (max-width:767px){#converter-v3-snapshot-capture-node-2 .converter-v3-snapshot-stage{max-width:374px;aspect-ratio:374 / 844;background-image:url("data:image/png;base64,")}}
    
  </style>
  <div class="converter-v3-snapshot-stage"></div>
</div>
